items.title: Warner Bros gets a new offer from Paramount in heated bidding war for the storied Hollywood studio
US consumer confidence improves modestly in February after cratering the first month of 2026
items.description: The American consumer’s confidence in the U.S. economy improved slightly in February after cratering a month earlier

items.title: Floods in Brazilian state of Minas Gerais kill at least 14 and force hundreds to leave homes
items.description: Severe floods in southeastern Brazil have killed at least 14 people

items.title: Home Depot tops expectations in the fourth quarter, but customers pull back on spending
items.description: Home Depot’s fiscal fourth-quarter performance was muted, as there was ongoing caution by American consumers amid a weak housing market

items.title: China restricts exports to 40 Japanese entities with ties to military
items.description: China restricts exports to 40 Japanese entities it says are contributing to Japan’s “remilitarization.”
